title: Single Room in Kendwa Beach
description: Cozy single room with a comfortable bed, fan, and shared bathroom. Steps from the white sandy beach, perfect for solo travelers seeking a peaceful stay.

title: Master Room in Bububu Family Home
description: Spacious master room with king-size bed, en-suite bathroom, and air conditioning. Located in a secure compound with garden and parking, ideal for couples or business travelers.

title: Double Room in Paje Sea View Apartment
description: Bright double room with two twin beds, balcony overlooking the Indian Ocean, and shared kitchen. Close to kite surfing spots and local restaurants.

title: Single Room in Kiwengwa Cottage
description: Simple single room in a traditional Swahili cottage, featuring a mosquito net, fan, and shared bathroom. Enjoy the tranquil lagoon atmosphere.

title: Master Room in Stone Town Historic Loft
description: Luxurious master room in a renovated coral stone building, with queen bed, private bathroom, and Wi-Fi. Walking distance to markets and cultural sites.

title: Double Room in Jambiani Beach Bungalow
description: Comfortable double room with a double bed, ceiling fan, and shared bathroom. Just a short walk to the beach and snorkeling spots.

title: Single Room in Chumbuni Modern Apartment
description: Modern single room with a single bed, work desk, and shared bathroom. Secure building with elevator, close to public transport and city center.

title: Master Room near Uwanja wa Ndege
description: Elegant master room with king bed, en-suite bathroom, and balcony. Located near the airport and major highways, perfect for transit guests.

title: Budget Single Room in Mchina
description: Basic single room with a single bed, fan, and shared bathroom. Ideal for backpackers on a budget, close to local eateries and shops.

title: Double Room in Paje Seaview Villa
description: Premium double room with king-size bed, private balcony overlooking the sea, en-suite bathroom, and access to villa pool. Includes daily housekeeping.

title: Single Room in Bububu Garden House
description: Quiet single room in a house with lush garden, featuring a single bed, fan, and shared bathroom. Great for a restful stay away from the bustle.

title: Master Room in Stone Town Luxury Suite
description: Opulent master room with four-poster bed, marble bathroom, and antique furnishings. Situated in a restored historic building near Forodhani Gardens.

title: Double Room in Kiwengwa Beachfront Bungalow
description: Bright double room with two twin beds, ceiling fan, and shared bathroom. Direct beach access and outdoor shower for a perfect seaside experience.

title: Single Room in Kendwa Shared Apartment
description: Furnished single room in a shared apartment, includes a single bed, desk, and shared kitchen/lounge. Ideal for backpackers and social travelers.

title: Master Room in Jambiani Eco-Friendly Villa
description: Sustainable master room built with local materials, featuring a king bed, solar-powered lighting, and private bathroom. Rainwater harvesting and organic garden on site.
